# Vibe-Trading Space

Vibe-Trading Space is an independent hosted workflow planner and SaaS companion for the open-source Vibe-Trading project.

Canonical site: https://vibe-trading.space/
Pricing: https://vibe-trading.space/pricing/
Docs: https://vibe-trading.space/docs/
Source notes: https://vibe-trading.space/source-notes/
Support: support@aigeamy.com

Core facts:
- Product category: finance research workflow planner.
- Upstream project: HKUDS/Vibe-Trading, MIT License.
- Upstream package: vibe-trading-ai.
- Inputs: trading prompt, market, horizon, workflow type, and risk assumptions.
- Outputs: sample run command, data-route assumptions, validation checklist, and paid workspace generation path.
- Limit: research and planning only; this site does not hold funds or execute trades.
